name: Allswell Luxe
tagline: Budget-friendly hybrid with luxury touches from a Walmart brand
description: The Allswell Luxe Hybrid is a surprisingly well-built mattress at a budget price point, backed by Walmart. It combines individually wrapped coils with graphite-infused memory foam and a quilted Euro-top cover. With copper gel infusion for cooling, it outperforms its price tag and is an excellent option for value seekers who want the hybrid feel without the premium price.
seoTitle: Allswell Luxe Hybrid 2026: Best Budget Hybrid Under $500?
seoDescription: Allswell Luxe packs hybrid coils, copper cooling, and a Euro-top into a budget mattress. Walmart brand, surprising quality. See our review!
